name: Centegra Health Bridge Fitness Center - Huntley
description: Come play pickleball at Centegra Health Bridge Fitness Center - Huntley in Huntley, IL! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.

name: Elite Warrior Training
description: Elite Warrior Training is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Woodstock, IL. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. You can reserve the courts. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, and trainers or lessons.
fees: Fee required — Prices vary based on membership status

name: Emricson Park
description: Woodstock IL's brand new pickleball courts in Emricson Park opened in August, 2024.

name: Knox Park
description: Come play pickleball at Knox Park in McHenry, IL! There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Life Time - Algonquin
description: Come play pickleball at Life Time - Algonquin in Algonquin, IL! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to food, locker rooms, water, restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, trainers or lessons, a pro shop or equipment store, and lights. You can reserve the courts.

description: Come play pickleball at Petersen Park in McHenry, IL! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

description: Come play pickleball at The Racket Club in Algonquin, IL! There are 3 indoor clay and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Woodstock Rec center
description: Come play pickleball at Woodstock Rec center in Woodstock, IL! There are 3 indoor acrylic and hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. You can’t reserve the courts.
